title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q4 2024
content:
Key Takeaways:
  • In Q4 2024, California's EV sales saw a 6.02% QoQ decline, with a notable decrease in the state's share of national EV sales.
  • However, BEVs and Hybrids showed growth, particularly in sales of Hybrid Electric Vehicles.
  • Renewable Diesel and Diesel sales both rose, while Santa Clara, San Mateo, and Orange counties led in EV sales per capita, despite declines in other major counties like Ventura and Kern.
author: Mansift Kaur
